behaviors.description: Required patient fields are validated before downstream processing; missing fields return a complete missing-items error.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: failure is at module handoff (validator must gate downstream orchestrator calls), not just field-check logic. REAL-INFRA: no real OS/network/subprocess required. LLM-DEP: none. MULTI-STEP: none. INTEGRATION-BRAKE passed (a/b/c all no). Rejected System/Agentic/Workflow because behavior text is local validation + control-flow gating only.
behaviors.test_description: Run intake orchestrator with payload missing multiple required fields; assert returned error lists all missing fields and assert insurance/triage/scheduling modules are not invoked.

behaviors.description: DOB validation rejects future dates, >150-year-old dates, and non-date strings.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: behavior is pure date parsing/range logic in one boundary. REAL-INFRA: none. LLM-DEP: none. MULTI-STEP: none. Rejected Integration+ because no module interaction is needed to expose this failure; behavior text is strictly input-validation rules.
behaviors.test_description: Directly test DOB validator with boundary and invalid-format cases, asserting specific rejection outcomes.

behaviors.description: Insurance eligibility check sends correct patient ID/plan code to payer API and interprets eligible/not eligible/pending.
behaviors.justification: REAL-INFRA: behavior explicitly depends on external payer API call semantics; payload/HTTP contract errors can be hidden by in-process mocks. MOCK-HIDE: yes, mock client can pass while real endpoint rejects shape/encoding. LLM-DEP: none. MULTI-STEP: none. Rejected Agentic/Workflow because no AI output dependence or multi-agent sequence in behavior text.
behaviors.test_description: Execute eligibility check against a real HTTP test endpoint (or payer sandbox) verifying outbound payload fields and status mapping for three real responses.

behaviors.description: If payer API is unreachable, eligibility becomes pending and intake continues.
behaviors.justification: REAL-INFRA: unreachable network/timeout/connection-refused behavior is environment-dependent. MOCK-HIDE: stubbing exceptions may miss real client timeout and retry edge behavior. LLM-DEP: none. MULTI-STEP: none. Rejected Integration because behavior text is specifically API unreachable handling.
behaviors.test_description: Run intake with payer endpoint made unreachable (real timeout/refusal); assert eligibility is set to pending and downstream triage/scheduling still execute.

behaviors.description: AI symptom triage assigns high urgency for emergency symptom combinations.
behaviors.justification: LLM-DEP: correctness is model judgment quality (clinical urgency classification), which is non-deterministic and cannot be validated by deterministic stubs. MULTI-STEP: single agentic decision, not pipeline. Rejected Workflow because behavior text covers one triage inference outcome.
behaviors.test_description: Run real triage model on emergency symptom fixtures (e.g., chest pain + shortness of breath) across repeated trials; assert high-urgency assignment rate meets threshold.

behaviors.description: Symptom triage returns clinician-reviewable natural-language explanation, not only numeric score.
behaviors.justification: LLM-DEP: explanation adequacy depends on real generative output quality. MOCK-HIDE: template/stub text would always pass format checks while missing real reasoning quality issues. MULTI-STEP: single model output requirement. Rejected Workflow because no chained agentic stages are specified.
behaviors.test_description: Call real triage model and evaluate explanation output against rubric (contains rationale tied to symptoms, readable clinical language, not score-only) over multiple runs.

behaviors.description: Scheduler picks first available slot matching urgency SLA (same-day high, within 48h medium).
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: failure appears when scheduling logic and calendar repository interact on availability ordering/SLA constraints. REAL-INFRA: can be caught with local DB/in-process wiring; no real network/OS needed. LLM-DEP: none. MULTI-STEP: none. INTEGRATION-BRAKE passed (a/b/c no). Rejected System because behavior text does not require environment-dependent effects.
behaviors.test_description: With seeded local calendar DB, run scheduler for high/medium urgencies and assert chosen slot is earliest valid and within required time windows.

behaviors.description: Scheduling avoids double-booking under concurrent patient processing.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: race condition manifests at app+shared DB transaction boundary. REAL-INFRA: local DB concurrency/locking is sufficient; no external network or OS primitive beyond process-level concurrency needed. LLM-DEP: none. MULTI-STEP: none. INTEGRATION-BRAKE passed (a/b/c no). Rejected System because behavior text is shared local calendar DB consistency, not external environment variability.
behaviors.test_description: Fire two concurrent scheduling requests targeting overlapping availability against the same local DB and assert only one booking succeeds for a slot.

behaviors.description: Confirmation includes patient name, appointment time, provider name, and visit-type-specific prep instructions.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: risk is contract/state propagation across scheduler/provider/templating modules. REAL-INFRA: no real network/OS needed if testing composed local modules. LLM-DEP: none. MULTI-STEP: none. INTEGRATION-BRAKE passed (a/b/c no). Rejected System/Agentic/Workflow because behavior text is deterministic message composition.
behaviors.test_description: Run confirmation generation from real scheduled-appointment objects and visit type metadata; assert all required fields and correct prep instructions are present.

behaviors.description: Full intake pipeline (validate, insurance, triage, schedule, confirm) completes automatically for a real patient submission.
behaviors.justification: MULTI-STEP: explicit end-to-end sequence includes an agentic triage step plus non-agentic steps. REAL-INFRA: includes real external payer API behavior; LLM-DEP: includes real AI triage output. This is beyond single agentic call, so Workflow is required. Rejected Agentic because behavior text requires full pipeline completion across multiple stages, not just triage quality.
behaviors.test_description: Execute full intake on a realistic submission in an environment using real payer API connectivity mode and real triage model; assert successful completion and persisted outputs for each stage without manual intervention.
